ddls:
CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "nama" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "no_register" TEXT /* Registration number assigned to the staff member */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position held by the staff member */,
  "formation_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the formation type of the staff member */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "date_left" TEXT /* Date the staff member left the institution (if applicable) */,
  "current_school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current school the staff member is assigned to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, retired, on leave) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the staff member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the staff member */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the staff member */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the staff member */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the staff member's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_formation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_type_id") REFERENCES formation_types ("formation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_current_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the position belongs to */,
  "salary_grade" TEXT /* Salary grade associated with the position */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formation_types" (
  "formation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formation type */,
  "formation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the formation type */,
  "formation_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the formation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the principal of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the school's website */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the school was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_principal_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_backgrounds" (
  "background_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational background record */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution attended */,
  "year_graduated" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "transcript_url" TEXT /* URL of the transcript or degree certificate */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA (Grade Point Average) of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("background_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_backgrounds_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "professional_qualifications" (
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each professional qualification record */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member */,
  "qualification_name" TEXT /* Name of the qualification */,
  "issuing_authority" TEXT /* Authority that issued the qualification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the qualification was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the qualification (if applicable) */,
  "certificate_url" TEXT /* URL of the qualification certificate */,
  "training_hours" INTEGER /* Number of training hours completed for the qualification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_professional_qualifications_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment history record */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employment (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the position (if applicable) */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supervisor during the employment period */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating during the employment period */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of any promotions */,
  "reason_for_promotion" TEXT /* Reason for any promotions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_records" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position held */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Amount of salary */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the salary */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  "paygrade" TEXT /* Pay grade associated with the salary */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Additional bonus amount */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Details of any benefits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_records_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_records_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_records_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation record */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluator */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the performance evaluation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., annual, mid-year) */,
  "evaluation_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the evaluation */,
  "improvement_plan" TEXT /* Improvement plan recommended for the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the evaluator */,
  "evaluator_position" TEXT /* Position of the evaluator */,
  "evaluator_email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the evaluator belongs to */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Professional qualifications of the evaluator */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
